room.caption: [G2-GreatP9] From the town of 'Some Where' go 3 right...
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA) blackTop=instance_create(0,0,oG2_BlackTop)

var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(205) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
